about.title: About
about.subtitle: The person behind the terminal.
about.bio: I'm Talon (like a claw), an infrastructure and deployment engineer in Montréal. I help small teams keep their software dependable, understandable, and firmly under their control. I hold a DEC in Computer Science Technology from Dawson College. I work in English and French.
about.credBody: I test promising open-source tools in my own homelab before I recommend them. You get the option that fits, not whatever happens to be trending.
about.githubLink: See what I've starred on GitHub
